1952.html:
136 reviews for Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro

  1. Rated 5 out of 5

    Rohan Sharma (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The new stem design is a massive upgrade over the Buds 2 Pro. It fits so much better in my ears and the call quality has improved drastically.

  2. Rated 4 out of 5

    Anjali (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Swipe up and down for volume is finally here! Thank you Samsung. The sound is incredibly crisp.

  3. Rated 1 out of 5

    Varun Das (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The pinch controls are terrible. I can never get it right on the first try, half the time it doesn't register.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Varun,

    We appreciate your feedback! There is a slight learning curve to the force sensors. You can easily adjust the pinch sensitivity and force required inside the Galaxy Wearable app settings to perfectly match your grip.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  4. Rated 5 out of 5

    Karthik Nair (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The dual drivers (planar + dynamic) make an unbelievable difference. 24-bit audio on my S24 Ultra sounds heavenly.

  5. Rated 4 out of 5

    Deepak Kumar (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Bhai sound quality ek number hai. Blade lights toh alag hi premium lagti hain raat me.

  6. Rated 5 out of 5

    Neha Patel (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Absolutely stunning transparent case lid. I can check the charging indicator without opening it. ANC is top tier.

  7. Rated 3 out of 5

    Srinivas (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Great sound, but the transparent case lid gets smudged and scratched very easily in the pocket.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Srinivas,

    We appreciate your feedback regarding the case finish. To maintain its pristine transparent look, we highly recommend using a protective silicone sleeve, which also protects against accidental drops.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  8. Rated 5 out of 5

    Gaurav V. (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The Blade Lights are a very cool aesthetic addition. Sets it apart from all other TWS out there.

  9. Rated 4 out of 5

    Manoj (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Galaxy AI integration is sick. Used the interpreter feature on a call and it translated almost perfectly in real-time.

  10. Rated 5 out of 5

    Priyanka (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Sound chala bagundi, blade lights keka. Definite upgrade if you own a Samsung phone.

  11. Rated 2 out of 5

    Arjun (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    SSC Codec requires Samsung phones. On my iPhone it's just AAC, feels like I am missing out on the 24-bit audio.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Arjun,

    While the Samsung Seamless Codec (SSC) is optimized exclusively for Galaxy devices, the Buds 3 Pro are still engineered with dual amps and tuned by AKG. They deliver exceptional, studio-grade audio over AAC on iOS devices as well!

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  12. Rated 5 out of 5

    Vignesh (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Semma bass, blade light mass a irukku. Best ANC earphones Samsung has ever made.

  13. Rated 4 out of 5

    Harish (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Pichle buds se fit bohot better hai, kaan me dard nahi hota lambe time tak pehen ne par.

  14. Rated 5 out of 5

    Abhinav Singh (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The 360 Audio with head tracking is insanely immersive while watching Netflix.

  15. Rated 3 out of 5

    Aditi (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Battery life with ANC and Blade lights constantly on is just about 4.5 to 5 hours. Expected slightly more for the price.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Aditi,

    Thank you for the review. The blade lights and 24-bit audio processing consume extra power. You can easily get 7+ hours of continuous playback by turning off the LED lights via the Wearable app during long listening sessions.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  16. Rated 5 out of 5

    Darshan (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Sound sakathagide, blade design chanagide. Connecting with Galaxy devices is totally seamless.

  17. Rated 4 out of 5

    Manoj Kumar (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Adaptive ANC is very smart, switches to ambient automatically when someone starts talking to me.

  18. Rated 5 out of 5

    Akhil (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Adipoli sound aanu, blade design super. Worth the premium price tag.

  19. Rated 1 out of 5

    Suresh Pillai (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Left bud battery drains much faster than the right one. Seems like a hardware defect.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Suresh,

    We deeply apologize for this issue. A slight battery variance is normal due to master/slave pairing, but rapid drain is a defect. Please mail us at help.vyntech@gmail.com and we will immediately process a full replacement.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  20. Rated 5 out of 5

    Kiran (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The dual drivers really make the vocals pop. Unbelievable clarity compared to older models.

  21. Rated 4 out of 5

    Riya (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Swipe se volume control wala feature sabse best laga. Highly convenient.

  22. Rated 5 out of 5

    Sneha (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Best buds for Galaxy users. The auto-switch between my tablet and phone is incredibly fast.

  23. Rated 3 out of 5

    Bhavya (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    ANC is good but the adaptive mode sometimes switches too late when crossing loud streets.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Bhavya,

    Thank you for the feedback. The adaptive algorithm learns your environment over time. You can also manually adjust the ambient sound detection sensitivity in the Galaxy Wearable app for a faster response!

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  24. Rated 5 out of 5

    Rishi Thakur (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Absolutely fantastic. The blade lights look so futuristic. Super comfortable for long hours.

  25. Rated 4 out of 5

    Ashish (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Call quality has massively improved compared to previous generations. The mics pick up voice perfectly.

  26. Rated 5 out of 5

    Kavya M (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Volume control swipe madodu tumba easy. Great product by Samsung.

  27. Rated 2 out of 5

    Praveen (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Doesn't fit my ears at all, stem is too long and touches my cheeks. Quite uncomfortable.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Praveen,

    We are sorry to hear about the fit issue. The angular stem design is modeled for an average ear contour. Please try swapping to the provided small or large eartips, as adjusting the seal often shifts the stem angle securely away from the cheek.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  28. Rated 5 out of 5

    Nithin (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Fit romba comfortable a irukku, no pain even after 5 hours of continuous use.

  29. Rated 4 out of 5

    Gaurav (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    ANC mast kaam karta hai metro me. Pura noise cut kar deta hai.

  30. Rated 5 out of 5

    Aman (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Galaxy AI features kollam. Using it for translation is literally living in the future.

  31. Rated 1 out of 5

    Vishal (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Got a defective piece, the transparent lid was cracked when I unboxed it.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Vishal,

    We deeply apologize for this transit damage! Your replacement has already been initiated. Please mail us your order ID at help.vyntech@gmail.com and we will ensure the new unit reaches you within 24 hours.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  32. Rated 5 out of 5

    Srinivas (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    గెలాక్సీ బడ్స్ 3 ప్రో సౌండ్ క్వాలిటీ అద్భుతం. డిజైన్ చాలా బాగుంది.

  33. Rated 4 out of 5

    Rohini (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Awesome product. Changing tracks with pinch takes a bit getting used to, but it's very precise.

  34. Rated 5 out of 5

    Gopinath (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    ಈ ಬಡ್ಸ್ 3 ಪ್ರೊ ಅತ್ಯುತ್ತಮವಾಗಿದೆ. ಸೌಂಡ್ ಕ್ಲಾರಿಟಿ ಮತ್ತು ANC ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿದೆ.

  35. Rated 3 out of 5

    Rahul (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Swipe volume is tricky when running. I end up pulling the bud out of my ear.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Rahul,

    We understand your concern. When using swipe gestures during heavy movement, we recommend lightly pinching the base of the stem with your thumb while swiping with your index finger. This ensures the bud stays perfectly secure!

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  36. Rated 5 out of 5

    Kannan (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    சாம்சங் பட்ஸ் 3 ப்ரோ தரத்தில் அருமை. பிளேட் லைட்ஸ் பார்க்க ரொம்ப நல்லா இருக்கு.

  37. Rated 4 out of 5

    Aditya Kumar (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The blade lights are cool but maybe a bit flashy for office. Luckily you can turn them off in the app.

  38. Rated 5 out of 5

    Biju (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    സാംസങ് ബഡ്സ് 3 പ്രോ മികച്ച ശബ്ദ നിലവാരം നൽകുന്നു. ഡിസൈൻ അടിപൊളിയാണ്.

  39. Rated 2 out of 5

    Manish (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Blade lights turn on randomly when I pull them out. Sometimes it's annoying in public.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Manish,

    We understand this can be surprising! The recent software update gives you complete control over the blade lights, including disabling the "auto-on upon removal" feature. Please update via the Galaxy Wearable app.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  40. Rated 5 out of 5

    Abhishek (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The most premium looking buds ever. Transparent case and angular stems look like a sci-fi gadget.

  41. Rated 4 out of 5

    Hemant (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Price ge worth anstu. Features are totally loaded, especially the translation mode.

  42. Rated 5 out of 5

    Saurabh (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Absolutely mind blowing hi-res audio. Cannot go back to standard buds after experiencing 24-bit audio.

  43. Rated 3 out of 5

    Deepali (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Price is too high for the features, to be honest. The design is unique but it's very expensive.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Deepali,

    We appreciate your honest feedback. The premium pricing directly reflects the implementation of dual amp planar drivers, 24-bit studio codec support, and real-time Galaxy AI processing, ensuring a truly flagship experience.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  44. Rated 5 out of 5

    Kunal (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    ANC completely blocks out background noise. Sound separation is god level.

  45. Rated 4 out of 5

    Yash (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Battery backup is solid, getting around 6 hours with ANC on. Clear vocals.

  46. Rated 5 out of 5

    Pradeep (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Loved the design. So much better to grip the stem compared to previous generations.

  47. Rated 3 out of 5

    Tushar (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Great sound, but case feels a bit cheap and plasticky compared to the soft matte finish of Buds 2 Pro.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Tushar,

    Thank you for your feedback! The top transparent lid is crafted from premium impact-resistant polycarbonate to allow visibility of the blade lights while charging, ensuring durability without compromising the futuristic aesthetic.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

    Absolutely wonderful piece of tech. Galaxy AI translator is mind-blowing.
